Our students completed their Arabic preparatory education in Jordan

22.09.2023

Students who chose Arabic language education in the preparatory class were sent to Jordan to complete the practical phase of their training. After one month of training at the Daru’l-Elsun Language Academy in Jordan between 18 August - 18 September, our students returned to Türkiye.

In addition, our students had the opportunity to visit historical and cultural sites in Jordan and practice the language with the local people. They visited iconic places such as Amman Castle, the Roman Theater, the Hussein Mosque, Rainbow Street, Ragadan Bazaar, Amman Station, and other historical and cultural sites in Jordan. They also explored Islamic landmarks in Jordan, including Petra, Wadi Rum, Aqaba, Salt, and Madaba cities.
